ddls:
CREATE TABLE "token_liquidity" (
  "liquidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Token ID */,
  "reserve0" REAL /* Reserve 0 value */,
  "reserve1" REAL /* Reserve 1 value */,
  "total_liquidity" REAL /* Total liquidity value */,
  "liquidity_provider" TEXT /* Liquidity provider */,
  " liquidity_pool_address" TEXT /* Liquidity pool address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liquidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Token ID */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Trading volume */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "trading_pair" TEXT /* Trading pair (e.g., ETH-USDT, BNB-BUSD, etc.) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Exchange ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rug_pulls" (
  "rugpull_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rug pull entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Token ID */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the rug pull */,
  "rugpull_type" TEXT /* Type of rug pull (e.g., 'burn', 'swap', etc.) */,
  "rugpull_amount" REAL /* Amount of rug pull */,
  "rugpull_address" TEXT /* Address responsible for rug pull */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rugpull_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., 'admin', 'analyst', etc.) */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., 'rug pull', 'large trade', etc.) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_data" (
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain entry */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the block */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Transaction hash */,
  "blockchain_name" TEXT /* Blockchain name (e.g., Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain, etc.) */,
  "blockchain_type" TEXT /* Blockchain type (e.g., mainnet, testnet, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each token pair */,
  "token0_id" INTEGER /* Token 0 ID */,
  "token1_id" INTEGER /* Token 1 ID */,
  "pair_address" TEXT /* Token pair address */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Token pair name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_velocities" (
  "velocity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each velocity entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Token ID */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity value */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval (e.g., 1h, 24h, 7d, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("velocity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange entry */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Exchange name */,
  "exchange_address" TEXT /* Exchange address */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of exchange creation */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of exchange update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Token ID */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval (e.g., 1h, 24h, 7d, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_holders" (
  "holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holder entry */,
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Token ID */,
  "holder_address" TEXT /* Holder address */,
  "holder_balance" REAL /* Holder balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holder_id")
)
